templates.template_text: Hi {{first_name}}, I noticed the CSV import for {{account_name}} hit a snag on row {{error_row}}. Our enterprise team is here to help—would you like me to flag this for your account manager, or should I send over our formatting guide for {{source_platform}}?
Hey {{first_name}}, looks like that file import didn't quite go through. It's usually just a header mismatch. Want to try our auto-mapper, or can I show you a quick template that works every time?

Hi {{first_name}}, setting up {{module_name}} can be complex for larger teams. I've prepared a custom checklist based on your current progress. Would you like to review it, or should we jump on a quick 5-minute call to clear the hurdle?
Almost there, {{first_name}}! You're just one step away from finishing the {{module_name}} setup. Most users find that clicking '{{button_hint}}' does the trick. Need a hand?

It looks like the invitation to {{invitee_email}} bounced. This often happens with strict enterprise firewalls. Would you like me to generate a manual join link you can send via Slack or Teams instead?
Whoops! The invite to {{invitee_email}} didn't go through. Double-check the spelling, or just copy this direct link to send it to them personally: {{manual_link}}.
Welcome to Cascade, {{first_name}}. To get the most out of your trial, we recommend connecting your CRM data first. I can walk you through the {{integration_name}} sync right now.
Ready to see some magic? Once you add your first 5 leads, this dashboard will start showing you revenue insights. Want to add them manually or sync your Google Contacts?

The connection to {{integration_name}} failed due to a permissions error. This usually requires Admin-level access in {{integration_name}}. Would you like the specific documentation to share with your IT team?
It looks like {{integration_name}} isn't letting us in. Usually, re-entering your credentials fixes this. Want to try again, or should I look into why the login failed?
I noticed your export of '{{report_name}}' failed. For large datasets, we recommend the 'Email when ready' option. Shall I trigger that for you now?
Sorry about that! Your report didn't download. I've saved a copy to your 'Recent Files' folder in Cascade so you can try again, or I can email it to {{user_email}}.
No results for '{{search_query}}'. If you're looking for records across sub-accounts, make sure the 'Global Search' toggle is active. Want me to enable that for you?
Couldn't find anything for '{{search_query}}'. Maybe try a broader term? If you're sure it's there, I can help you check if it was archived by mistake.
Your workspace has reached its API rate limit for the hour. This might affect your {{integration_name}} sync. Would you like to discuss increasing these limits for your trial period?
Slow down there! You've hit our temporary API limit. Things will reset in about {{time_remaining}}. In the meantime, you can still manage your leads manually.
I saw you were looking at our {{plan_name}} options. If you need a custom MSA or security review before proceeding, I can connect you with our legal desk immediately.
Still deciding on a plan? If you're not sure which features you need for {{company_name}}, I can recommend the best fit based on your usage so far.
Hi {{first_name}}, we haven't seen your team in Cascade for a few days. Is there anything blocking the {{project_name}} rollout that I can assist with?
Missing you in Cascade, {{first_name}}! You were so close to finishing your first workflow. Want to jump back in and see how it's performing?
It looks like you tried to access {{resource_name}} without the required permissions. Since you're an Admin, you can grant yourself access in the Security Settings, or I can do it for you now.
Oops, that area is restricted. You might need to adjust your role settings to view {{resource_name}}. Need a link to your profile settings?
The bulk update for {{record_count}} records failed to complete. It seems {{failure_reason}} caused the interruption. I've isolated the failed records into a new view for you to review.
Something went wrong with that big update. Only {{success_count}} out of {{total_count}} records were changed. Want me to try the rest again for you?
Need help getting your data into Cascade? I noticed your import failed. I can take a look at your file, or you can try our 'Easy-Uploader' tool.
Don't get stuck! Most people finish this step in under a minute. Here is a 30-second video showing exactly how to set up your {{feature_name}}.
Looks like that invite didn't reach {{invitee_email}}. Check for typos, or try inviting them using a different email address.
Welcome! Let's get some data in here so you can see what Cascade can do. Would you like to start with a sample dataset to explore the features?
Connection failed! Don't worry, this is usually just a setting in {{integration_name}}. Here is a quick guide on how to fix it.
Your export hit a snag. This sometimes happens on trial accounts with very large files. Try selecting a smaller date range, or let me send it to your email.
No luck with that search? Try using just the last name or the company domain. I'm here if you need help finding a specific lead!
You're moving fast! You've reached the trial API limit. It resets soon, but if you're testing a large integration, let me know and we can adjust it.
Saw you checking out the plans! Do you have any questions about which features are included in the {{plan_name}}? I'd love to help you choose.
Is there anything I can do to help you get started again? Your trial for {{company_name}} is still active, and I'd hate for you to miss out on the {{feature_name}} features.
You've stumbled into a restricted area! On the trial, some administrative settings are locked. Want to see a demo of our Enterprise security features?
That bulk action didn't quite finish. It's likely due to a formatting issue in your selection. Want to try again with a smaller batch?
Hi {{first_name}}, the client import for {{client_name}} failed. As a partner, you can use our 'Debug Console' to see exactly which field caused the rejection. Want the link?
Helping a client through onboarding? I noticed a delay at the {{step_name}} stage. Here is the partner-specific guide for white-labeling this step.
The OAuth handshake for {{client_name}} failed. Please ensure the client has granted 'Offline Access' in their {{integration_name}} settings.
Ready to move this client to a paid plan? Remember, as a partner, you get a 20% commission on the {{plan_name}} for the first year. Need the referral link?
